tracks.gt_lyric:
[intro-short]
[verse] Walking through the city rain. Each step feels like a memory.
[chorus] The warmth of yesterday remains. But you are gone.
[outro-short]
tracks.descriptions: female, pop, sad, piano, the bpm is 120

tracks.gt_lyric:
[intro-short]
[verse] Thunder in the valley tonight. We ride until the morning light.
[chorus] We burn we rise we fight. Against the dying of the light.
[outro-short]
tracks.descriptions: male, rock, energetic, electric guitar and drums, the bpm is 140
